title: murtughas villosa
side_effects: Murtughas villosa can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems, which can range from mild to severe. In some cases, improper use of the plant has led to increased heart rate, blood pressure, and even cardiac arrest due to its stimulant properties. Additionally, ingesting the plant can cause nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, as well as interact with medications, such as blood thinners and antidepressants. If you are considering using murtughas villosa, consult a medical professional to ensure safe and proper use.
